creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org (FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=123405

Please use this patch instead - the game was updated to 0.6.

--- jigzo-0.6.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN jigzo.orig/Makefile jigzo/Makefile
--- jigzo.orig/Makefile	2008-05-07 04:08:44.000000000 +0400
+++ jigzo/Makefile	2008-05-07 04:08:51.000000000 +0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	jigzo
-PORTVERSION=	0.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.6
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.iua.upf.es/~mdeboer/resorama/jigzo/ \
 		http://www.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/
diff -ruN jigzo.orig/distinfo jigzo/distinfo
--- jigzo.orig/distinfo	2008-05-07 04:08:44.000000000 +0400
+++ jigzo/distinfo	2008-05-07 04:09:22.000000000 +0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (jigzo-0.5.tgz) = 4ca868ca80c2a9ad9b4bf92c7287d598
-SHA256 (jigzo-0.5.tgz) = 57bd9163f902a98440ee4ce2c9a0b7378cc6af796c2c5ecaef5d060450395d9a
-SIZE (jigzo-0.5.tgz) = 4609883
+MD5 (jigzo-0.6.tgz) = ad5270cb4af7a0f916df8b0a50636d2d
+SHA256 (jigzo-0.6.tgz) = 906b4ef396be87efc4b8fdf74a5cac55c17f1df94f8bedc3ffa4347778d216b5
+SIZE (jigzo-0.6.tgz) = 4668879
diff -ruN jigzo.orig/files/patch-Makefile jigzo/files/patch-Makefile
--- jigzo.orig/files/patch-Makefile	2008-05-07 04:08:44.000000000 +0400
+++ jigzo/files/patch-Makefile	2008-05-07 04:10:55.000000000 +0400
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
---- Makefile.orig	2008-04-03 01:16:52.000000000 +0400
-+++ Makefile	2008-04-03 13:45:02.000000000 +0400
+--- Makefile.orig	2008-05-07 02:26:41.000000000 +0400
++++ Makefile	2008-05-07 04:10:55.000000000 +0400
 @@ -19,7 +19,7 @@
  ARCH_OK = yes
  endif
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
  # Variables
  #
  
--CXXFLAGS = -O2 $(ARCHCXXFLAGS) -DENABLE_SOUND
+-CXXFLAGS = -g $(ARCHCXXFLAGS) -DENABLE_SOUND
 -LDFLAGS = -O2 $(ARCHLDFLAGS)
 +STRIP = strip
 +APP = jigzo
--- jigzo-0.6.patch ends here ---

-- 
Dmitry A. Marakasov    | jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru       | http://www.amdmi3.ru
